<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\CacheClearer; /** * CacheClearerInterface. * * @author Dustin Dobervich <ddobervich@gmail.com> */ interface CacheClearerInterface { /** * Clears any caches necessary. */ public function clear(string $cacheDir): void; }
